chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5240 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.21879/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 and 3 3. For order on Misc. No.21880/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.21881/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 28.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner has sought quashment of FIR No.837 of 2025, registered under Section 489-F PPC at Police Station Steel Town, Karachi. We find that learned counsel for the petitioner has not made out any reasonable ground for quashment of the aforesaid FIR. The petitioner shall join the inquiry. The SHO of PS Steel Town, Karachi and the Investigating Officer of the aforesaid FIR shall ensure that the inquiry is carried out impartially, fairly and strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SSP District Malir, Karachi, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
